Blood Orchid Katana  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 23
DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +6 DEX: +6 STA: +6 AGI: +6
Effect: Spirit of Wolf (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 8.0) at Level 50
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Blood Orchid Katana
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 23
DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +6 DEX: +6 STA: +6 AGI: +6
Effect: Spirit of Wolf (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 8.0) at Level 50
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 18:00:05
Page Updated:Sun Sep 11th, 2016

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Veeshan's Peak 1.0
NPC Name
Druushk

Veeshan's Peak 2.0
NPC Name
Travenro the Skygazer


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Veeshan's Peak 1.0


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

▲ Page top
Remove from Druushk loot list
QuoteReply
# Sep 02 2009 at 9:23 AM Rating: Good
-REDACTED-
Scholar
47 posts
Received this email from SOE:

Me - 8/29/09:

" I have been killing both Druushk and Travenro the Skygazer in Veeshans Peak for several weeks now and have not seen the Blood Orchid Katana drop at all - or any of Druushk's other older items.

I did get a Orchid Bloom Katana to drop once off Travenro but not the Blood Orchid Katana.

Does the Blood Orchid Katana still drop at all in the game or has it been removed or moved to a different mob?"

GM Felthius response - 8/29/05:

"Hail Adventurer! GM Felthius here.

Thank you for contacting Sony Online Entertainment In-game customer service regarding your loot drop inquiry. To the best of my knowledge, the Blood Orchid Katana does not drop off of Druushk but it does drop from Travenro the Skygazer. I hope you find this information helpful."

Senior GM Felthius
In-game CSR - EQ
Sony Online Entertainment
▲ Page top
Recent info.
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2007 at 11:57 PM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
1 post
Recently got this. There was a few items with clicky sow out there that was self-only, but this one is still clickable for your target and you. Drops off Travenro the Skygazer *For me at least* at the entrance to VP as a rarespawn named off the PH'es at the beginning. Good luck on your hunt! Took me days heh.

Edited, Mar 10th 2007 1:12pm by Daerken

man i need one of these as a warrior...never to use for fighting but to cast whenever i need it, would be so awesome

Better
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2004 at 1:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591803138221
50 posts
Just because there is better stuff out there for this level, doesnt change the fact that it is a good weapon. So what if the stats arent all uber good. So what? Doesnt change the fact its a good weapon. 12/23 isnt that bad of a ratio either.

Edited, Wed Mar 24 01:10:34 2004
▲ Page top
Class argument (sigh)
QuoteReply
# Oct 13 2002 at 6:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759503792
74 posts
Most players at the level required to get this already have better. Thus its cast effect would probably be the defining element in who gets it. Bards have Selo's and Rangers have SoW. It probably would be awarded to the other classes in that case.
▲ Page top
RE: Class argument (sigh)
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2003 at 11:21 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779724005
33 posts
While the exact nature of how this item would be awarded varies infinitely (as guilds are allowed to define this themselves) I doubt anyone in this day and age would even want it for SoW. Yes, that WOULD be useful, but for the amount of effort it takes to get into VP, and how lousy the loot is, I'd say this weapon would be treated as a melee epic. It's cool to have, but its utility is most likely outweighed by the fact that it's a symbol of status.
▲ Page top
RE: Class argument (sigh)
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2003 at 10:57 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1685319407916
45 posts
It's utility is the ability to cast SoW. Hardly useless at any level for a melee.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 23 2003 at 4:19 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Acually Sow effect would be useless, by the time u can get here u would have run speed3 probably, and if u dont you can cast sow
RE: Class argument (sigh)
QuoteReply
# Nov 14 2003 at 5:28 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362009150
144 posts
thats ignorant... sow is way faster than run3... hell jboots are a little faster than run3... if i were a warr i wouldnt pass this up... i know warr's hate running through a zone and then all of a sudden get attacked then your sow wears off... lol... it sucks... plus... think of the money you'd save by not having to buy sow potions anymore... before you say somehting is useless... remeber there is always someone who would use it...
▲ Page top
RE: Class argument (sigh)
QuoteReply
# Oct 26 2003 at 12:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783833539
20 posts
Yep..run 3 is just like having Jboots (but I've witness where my Jboots is just slightly faster than run 3, running along side my wife's cleric w/ run 3). Run 3 is about 33% faster than regular running and sow at lv 50 is 55% faster, therefore, a sow effect is very usefull indeed.

Edited, Sun Oct 26 01:19:04 2003

# Jul 23 2003 at 3:52 PM Rating: Good

3,705 posts
Sow is faster than run 3. My cleric has run 3, and I'll still bum a sow when I'm going anywhere, particularly if its dangerous.
▲ Page top
Great... an almost unachievable sow item for melee classes!!
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2002 at 7:41 AM Rating: Decent
Releaser
Scholar
1,036 posts
The sad thing is, other than J Boots, this is one of the few items in EQ that character's other than druids can gain sow from. And this thing is damn near impossible to get.

I think it's time the gnomes started producing more sow imbued items because I'm getting sick of forking out 100pp a time for sow potions.

Seems a total waste of time producing sow items for classes that cast it as an afterthought when the rest of us are running our legs to stumps across WC and other wonderfully large and dull zones.

Count to ten... breathe and stay calm.
____________________________
Fey :: Excalibur :: FFXIV
Releaser :: Fenrir :: FFXI
Grizzlebeard :: Drinal :: EQ
Crossbones :: Aggramar :: WoW

RE: Great... an almost unachievable sow item for melee class

It isn't a complete waste to have sow on items for classes that cast it anyways. I like equipping a sow item so I have one extra spell slot open.

Cool Weapon, Jealous Samurai
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2002 at 1:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758767717
1 post
I really want to get this weapon. problem is i dont see how a person could possibly kill that thing without at least three level sixtys. Also it says that Druushk is level 65 to kill. is that POSSIBLE?
▲ Page top
RE: Cool Weapon, Jealous Samurai
QuoteReply
# Jan 31 2002 at 7:30 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593361662060
196 posts
At least 3? :)
VP is a high end zone (although now largely eclipsed by ToV) and you'd need to get a large guild raid together to hunt it. I very much doubt that a single group would last very long here. Raiders should probably be, at a minimum, 54, to reduce the aggro range (which is considerable anyway in VP) and should aim to have an unbuffed MR of 100.

Nenelyan
Torv
▲ Page top

# Dec 02 2001 at 5:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772320000
2 posts
This item is real, i dont own one personally there is not a perma effect on it.. its right click castable on you and your friends it drops in VP im positive unless there is a new one in tov too that im not aware of yet. No it doesnt work in doungens that would just promote training 8OP

60th Warrior

no your right it drops in vp and only vp

QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2001 at 4:03 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Ya goofs. You still can't sow indoors. And Veeshan's Peak (VP not ToV) is an outdoor zone. In fact jboots are useful for a Druushk fight since he dispels.

And yeah if curious you can right-click this to cast sow on yourself and others.
▲ Page top
oh btw
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2001 at 4:24 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Two corrections to this item:

Druushk is found in Veeshan's Peak, not Temple of Veeshan

The weapon's effect is not permanent, it's Triggered. (Right-click)

And it's not fake.

# Jul 31 2002 at 8:43 PM Rating: Decent
Lolien
31 posts
Also, if a weapon has a proc that cast's SoW. Like the ranger Lupine Dagger, it also says that you cannon cast this spell indoors.

So they have programmed it to not work indoors if it was a proc.

Velk 65 Arch Lich of <Europa Agnarr> (Retired)

▲ Page top
it's not fake
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2001 at 11:52 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
"Unless verant has some sort of programming to disable the sow effect indoors (which i doubt)."

Doubt away.

right-click jboots: You cannot cast this spell indoors.
right-click tboots: You cannot cast this spell indoors.
right-click journeywalker boots: You cannot cast this spell indoors.
right-click sow potions: You cannot cast this spell indoors.
casting sow: You cannot cast this spell indoors.

and...*drumroll*

right-click blood orchid katana: You cannot cast this spell indoors.

Imagine!
▲ Page top
HOLY SHIT
